subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was perused and its abundant meanings were understood. Praise be unto God that in this journey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان ورق مسطور ملحوظ شد و معانی موفور مفهوم الحمد لله در این سفر
subcodes.subjects: @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @prayer for service, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @banishments of Baha'u'llah
